description: As the Product Operations Manager, standardize the Redmine Issue Priorities to match the company's new Agile policy. Rename the 'Immediate' priority to 'Critical', create a new priority named 'Blocker', and deactivate the 'Low' priority without deleting it. Ensure 'Normal' is set as the default priority and adjust the sort order so the active priorities appear in the following sequence of increasing urgency: Normal, High, Urgent, Critical, and Blocker.
